rpl_stop_replica_timeout 31536000 –
rpl_stop_slave_timeout 31536000 –
schema_definition_cache 256 default
secondary_engine_cost_threshold 100000.000000 –
secure_file_priv /var/lib/mysql-files/ modified
secure_log_path –
select_into_buffer_size 131072 –
select_into_disk_sync OFF –
select_into_disk_sync_delay 0 –
server_id 2887715330 –
server_id_bits 32 –
server_uuid 6f9988d6-3d9b-11f1-b1fa-e28c418305f9 –
session_track_gtids OFF default
session_track_schema ON default
session_track_state_change OFF default
session_track_system_variables time_zone,autocommit,character_set_client,character_set_results,character_set_connection default
session_track_transaction_info OFF default
sha256_password_auto_generate_rsa_keys ON –
sha256_password_private_key_path private_key.pem –
sha256_password_proxy_users OFF –
sha256_password_public_key_path public_key.pem –
show_create_table_verbosity OFF default
show_gipk_in_create_table_and_information_schema ON –
show_old_temporals OFF default
skip_external_locking ON default
skip_name_resolve OFF default
skip_networking OFF default
skip_replica_start OFF –
skip_show_database OFF default
skip_slave_start OFF –
slave_allow_batching ON –
slave_checkpoint_group 512 –
slave_checkpoint_period 300 –
slave_compressed_protocol OFF –
slave_exec_mode STRICT –
slave_load_tmpdir /tmp –
slave_max_allowed_packet 1073741824 –
slave_net_timeout 60 –
slave_parallel_type LOGICAL_CLOCK –
slave_parallel_workers 4 –
slave_pending_jobs_size_max 134217728 –
slave_preserve_commit_order ON –
slave_rows_search_algorithms INDEX_SCAN,HASH_SCAN –
slave_skip_errors OFF –
slave_sql_verify_checksum ON –
slave_transaction_retries 10 –
slave_type_conversions –
slow_launch_time 2 default
slow_query_log OFF default
slow_query_log_always_write_time 10.000000 –
slow_query_log_file /var/lib/mysql/node0-slow.log –
slow_query_log_use_global_control –
socket /var/lib/mysql/mysql.sock –
sort_buffer_size 262144 default
source_verify_checksum OFF –
sql_auto_is_null OFF default
sql_big_selects ON default
sql_buffer_result OFF default
sql_generate_invisible_primary_key OFF –
sql_log_off OFF default
sql_mode ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY,STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,NO_ZERO_IN_DATE,NO_ZERO_DATE,ERROR_FOR_DIVISION_BY_ZERO,NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION default
sql_notes ON default
sql_quote_show_create ON default
sql_replica_skip_counter 0 –
sql_require_primary_key OFF default
sql_safe_updates OFF default
sql_select_limit 18446744073709551615 default
sql_slave_skip_counter 0 –
sql_warnings OFF default
ssl_ca ca.pem –
ssl_capath –
ssl_cert server-cert.pem –
ssl_cipher –
ssl_crl –
ssl_crlpath –
ssl_fips_mode OFF –
ssl_key server-key.pem –
ssl_session_cache_mode ON –
ssl_session_cache_timeout 300 –
stored_program_cache 256 default
stored_program_definition_cache 256 –
super_read_only OFF default
sync_binlog 1 default
sync_master_info 10000 default
sync_relay_log 10000 default
sync_relay_log_info 10000 default
sync_source_info 10000 –
system_time_zone UTC –
table_definition_cache 2000 default
table_encryption_privilege_check OFF –
table_open_cache 4000 default
table_open_cache_instances 16 default
table_open_cache_triggers 524288 –
tablespace_definition_cache 256 –
temptable_max_mmap 1073741824 –
temptable_max_ram 1073741824 default
temptable_use_mmap ON –
terminology_use_previous NONE –
tf_sequence_table_max_upper_bound 1048576 –
thread_cache_size 9 default
thread_handling one-thread-per-connection –
thread_pool_high_prio_mode transactions –
thread_pool_high_prio_tickets 4294967295 –
thread_pool_idle_timeout 60 –
thread_pool_max_threads 100000 –
thread_pool_oversubscribe 3 –
thread_pool_size 48 –
thread_pool_stall_limit 500 –
thread_stack 1048576 default
thread_statistics OFF –
time_zone SYSTEM –
tls_ciphersuites –
tls_version TLSv1.2,TLSv1.3 default
tmp_table_size 16777216 default
tmpdir /tmp –
transaction_alloc_block_size 8192 default
transaction_isolation REPEATABLE-READ default
transaction_prealloc_size 4096 default
transaction_read_only OFF default
transaction_write_set_extraction XXHASH64 –
unique_checks ON default
updatable_views_with_limit YES –
userstat OFF –
version 8.0.42-33 –
version_comment Percona Server (GPL), Release 33, Revision 9dc49998 –
version_compile_machine x86_64 –
version_compile_os Linux –
version_compile_zlib 1.3.1 –
version_suffix –
wait_timeout 28800 default
windowing_use_high_precision ON –
xa_detach_on_prepare ON –
